title: This Girl, That Girl, and the Other One

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser takes special note of
Mihono Bourbon, who she will inevitably face on
the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, her friend Nice Nature is
troubled over the news that Tokai Teio won't be
running in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's so caught up on what other people are
saying that she can't concentrate on her own
training. She asks Tannhauser for advice on what
to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser answers confidently. "You
just have to win so convincingly that no one will
even compare you to Teio."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her answer gives Nice Nature the courage to look
to the future with a smile on her face again.
